spans.text: the proud columns of deserted Troy , And wandering shepherd's
sighs his anxious wish proclaim To reach , again , his happy cottage door ; For there , his wife , his little children , dwell ; Their smiles shall pay the toil of many an hour
the toil of many an hour
warm tears to expectation swell , As fancy over his mind extends her power
where once the song , The song of heroes , waked the midnight air , Save , when a solemn murmur rolled along
the midnight air , Save , when a solemn murmur
where once the song , The song of heroes , waked the midnight air , Save , when a solemn murmur rolled along
Shaking the marble temple to its fall
Swift from his couch he sprung , and '
the ruffian , in his vengeance , low
his slanting beams Dart their long lines on Ilion's towered scite
The distant Hellespont with morning gleams , And old Scamander
the day , His children , wife and happy home
